recommendations.title: Small Crimes
recommendations.overview: A disgraced former cop, fresh off a six-year prison sentence for attempted murder, returns home looking for redemption but winds up trapped in the mess he left behind.

recommendations.title: Azrael
recommendations.overview: In a world where no one speaks, a devout female hunts down a young woman who has escaped her imprisonment. Recaptured by its ruthless leaders, Azrael is due to be sacrificed to pacify an ancient evil deep within the surrounding wilderness.

recommendations.title: Güeros
recommendations.overview: Set amidst the 1999 student strikes in Mexico City, this coming-of-age tale finds two brothers venturing through the city in a sentimental search for an aging legendary musician. Shot in black-and-white, Güeros brims with youthful exuberance.

recommendations.title: Nobody
recommendations.overview: Hutch Mansell, a suburban dad, overlooked husband, nothing neighbor — a "nobody." When two thieves break into his home one night, Hutch's unknown long-simmering rage is ignited and propels him on a brutal path that will uncover dark secrets he fought

recommendations.title: Night Always Comes
recommendations.overview: Facing eviction in a city her family can no longer afford, a woman plunges into a desperate and increasingly dangerous all-night search to raise $25,000.

recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
recommendations.overview: With the price on his head ever increasing, John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends in

recommendations.title: Death of a Cyclist
recommendations.overview: A couple having an affair strike a bicyclist with their car and do not offer aid out of fear of their relationship being exposed.

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: The Chaser
recommendations.overview: Joong-ho is a dirty detective turned pimp, who's in financial trouble as several of his girls have recently disappeared without clearing their debts. While trying to track them down, he finds a clue that the vanished girls were all called up by the s
